title: Agent Engineer Cant Sing Meme
brief: A funny meme-style illustration for the end of an article. Split screen: Left side shows a confident female singer (stylized, not realistic) in elegant flowing dress standing on a glowing stage under a full moon, with '200 OK' and '99.99% Uptime' badges floating around her. Right side shows a tired software engineer at a desk with headphones, looking at a waveform on screen that crashes at E4 with a big red error message: '503 Service Unavailable' and 'Throat Gateway Timeout'. The contrast is humorous - one side is glamorous perfection, the other is relatable failure. Dark background on stage side, bright office light on engineer side. Comic/meme style with bold text. Bilingual Chinese/English labels.
